# Saksham Tomer - Full Stack Agentic AI Engineer

Welcome to the AI and LLM context file for Saksham Tomer.

## Professional Summary
Saksham Tomer is a Full Stack Agentic AI Engineer specializing in integrating LLMs, multi-agent systems (LangGraph, MCP), RAG pipelines, and cloud-native microservices on AWS/Vercel. He runs an independent AI agency delivering premium web experiences and intelligent automation systems for ambitious founders - shipped fast, built right.

## Technical Skills
- Languages: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust, Go, Java, C, Solidity
- AI / Agentic: LangGraph, LangChain, RAG, MCP (Model Context Protocol), Multi-agent Orchestration, Prompt Engineering, Hugging Face, LLM Fine-tuning, Vector Databases, Embeddings, OpenAI / Anthropic / Gemini APIs
- Frontend: React.js, Next.js, Remix, Redux, WebGL, WebGPU, Three.js, WebSockets, WebRTC, HTML5, CSS3
- Backend: Node.js, Express.js, FastAPI, Spring Boot, REST APIs, GraphQL, Microservices, WebHooks
- Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS (S3, EC2, Lambda, Cognito), Docker, CI/CD, Nginx, Serverless, Prisma ORM
- Blockchain: Solana, Ethereum, Smart Contracts, Anchor, Metaplex
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Pinecone, ChromaDB

## Key Projects
- Multi-Agent RAG Pipeline: Built with LangGraph & LangChain, fetching data, performing vector similarity search.
- MetaNft: E-commerce platform with 3D product previews (Three.js), Stripe integration, Node.js backend.
- SolXPass: Solana web3 event ticketing system via compressed NFTs leveraging Metaplex and Anchor.
- SpriteGen: WebAssembly-powered utility in Rust for generating high-performance spritesheets.
- LocalCHat: Localized AI reasoning models using LLaVA with real-time text-to-speech UI context processing.
- Chaos Crowd: Solana-powered crowdfunding platform built on the Blinks standard.
